# Third-Party Python Runtime Area

Python is a third-party runtime component.

License area:

```text
third_party_python_runtime
```

License:

```text
Python Software Foundation License Version 2
```

This license area is separated from:

```text
qikvrt_source_code = Apache-2.0
qikvrt_non_source_content = CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0
```

The Python runtime must remain separately attributed and documented. It is not relicensed as QIK-VRT content.

q.e.d. Ingolf Lohmann
